evidence: "This movie is incredibly fast paced... But like I said there is action and lot's of it."
"It's a great feel good movie that leaves you shaking your head in disbelief."
"The story is about the 'Sleepover' Bandits who would kidnap the bank manager... a fairly good plot make the movie."
"Unlike the sequel MI:2, Mission Impossible is a very thickened plot with many twists that leave you thinking; what is going to happen next?"
"This movie doesn't require any thinking at all."
"The DVD is cool because it explains that they actually used some of the underground racing community to fill in as extra's."
"The DVD edition is great because of the special features..."
"What a movie, that's all I can say. Will Smith is at his comedic best in this sci-fi movie..."
"I wish I could blame the actors for not taking on challenges..."
"The special deleted scenes are pretty good, and it shows several different camera angles for the truck scene at the end, which is pretty intense."
"It's a great feel good movie that leaves you shaking your head in disbelief."
"There is very raw emotion plus a very raw love scene."
"This movie when it reaches its climax has those watching waiting to stand and take the vow, 'O captain my Captain!'"

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced action and comedy films, often appreciating visual spectacle and humor. They have a mixed preference for narrative complexity and emotional depth, indicating a balance between entertainment and thought-provoking content.
